working_on: Engine-memory capture surface + dual-write — author transcript_capture.py + capture.py + diary.py + tools.py (2 of 6 MCP tools wired) + engine-memory-capture.sh hook shim + .claude/settings.json dual-write + shutdown SKILL/ops-doc parity update. Closes T1-B of ADR 0091 first-exercise readiness note at first natural Stop hook fire post-S-0190.
outcome_summary: Engine-memory capture surface + dual-write landed per ADR 0091 (Issue #138, T1-B authored, awaiting first natural Stop hook fire to close). 9 new files (~647 LOC excluding tests): transcript_capture.py (Stop/PreCompact handler with stdin-JSON contract, JSONL parse, user-message-count high-water-mark watermark via capture_state, noise-stripping >10KB blocks to head+tail summary, chunking >50KB across drawers, INSERT room='work'/source_kind='hook_{stop,precompact}' drawers, idempotent re-fire), capture.py (python -m entrypoint), diary.py (plain-text write_entry+read_entries), tools.py (MCP REGISTRY with 2 of 6 tools — engine_memory_add_drawer + engine_memory_diary_write, Python-side room/source_kind allowlist validation), engine-memory-capture.sh (bash shim sourcing scrub_env.sh per ADR 0045/0050, always exits 0), plus 4 new test files (test_transcript_capture 36, test_capture 5, test_diary 9, test_tools 15) + 3 added test_mcp_server tests = 68 new pytests. 5 modified: mcp_server.py wires tools.REGISTRY (v0.2.0), .claude/settings.json Stop+PreCompact hooks now run BOTH mempalace-hook-wrapper.sh AND engine-memory-capture.sh (parallel-write per ADR 0078), shutdown SKILL.md + ops doc name new diary+add_drawer tool surfaces alongside old (S-0192 cutover; step structure unchanged per ADR 0089 parity). 99/99 engine/memory tests pass (was 31 at S-0189). MCP smoke green (tools/list returns 2 wired tools). Capture hook smoke green end-to-end (synthetic JSONL → 1 drawer first fire, 0 on re-fire — watermark idempotency confirmed). validate.py runs cleanly in <60s with 0 hard-fails, 419 soft-warns (all annotated baselines). Pre-commit hook caught 4 ruff format misses + 6 mypy errors which were fixed inline (test_capture.py monkeypatch path; test_transcript_capture.py Any→int casts). Risk #9 (transcript-path env-var resolution) resolved during planning — Claude Code pipes JSON to stdin with transcript_path field; no env vars involved. engine/tools regression suite (~1500 tests) hung twice on chromadb file-lock contention from accumulated mempalace-mcp processes — third consecutive recurrence of the failure mode ADR 0091 supersedes (per S-0188→S-0189 user-cited note, now reconfirmed at S-0190). Lesson captured at drawer_paideia_lessons_469873d7f0a87934c9aefcbc with operational guidance (pkill -f 'mempalace.*mcp' + use .venv/bin/python directly). Next session item: S-0191 — read surface + verification harness + cutover gate. Mid-session, the user surfaced the recurring silent-hang pattern (pytest engine/tools "hung" then exited with no output). Root cause located: engine/tools/_venv_reexec.py:ensure_venv_python() was called at module-import time by 4 engine/tools modules (validate.py, setup_env.py, check_target.py, seed_qa_shard.py); pytest collecting test_validate.py triggered a mid-collection os.execv that the harness output capture cannot follow. Structural fix landed (SHA f703140): the function now uses inspect.stack()[1] + sys.modules["__main__"].__file__ to detect script-vs-import context and skips re-exec when imported. 2 new regression tests + helper added; existing tests updated. Full engine/tools regression now passes: 1487 passed, 18 skipped, 0 failed in 2:44 under system Python 3.9 (the configuration that previously appeared hung). Drive-by mypy fixes for 4 pre-existing import-not-found errors + 1 returning-Any-from-bool that surfaced when mypy gated validate.py for the first time in this commit chain. Close-push hit Issue #139 (readiness-note edits forbidden in close-allowlist) and required a split into deliverable follow-up + clean close after user-approved parent-main rollback.
next_session_handle: S-0191 — Engine-memory read surface + verification harness + cutover gate (per Issue #138 + parent plan ~/.claude/plans/mempalace-overhead-is-dragging-twinkly-harp.md section 'S-0191'). Build session. Deliverables: engine/memory/boot_surface.py (three-formulation pattern preserved — literal/conceptual/adjacent; runs the FTS5 + BM25 + recency + tag-class-boost SQL against drawers_fts; writes idempotent '## Prior context (engine memory)' section to engine/session/current_plan.md with top-8 candidates surfaced inline); 4 more MCP tools wired into engine/memory/tools.py REGISTRY (engine_memory_search, engine_memory_get_drawer, engine_memory_list_drawers, engine_memory_diary_read) — total reaches 6/6 pre-committed ceiling per ADR 0091 Decision 5; engine/tools/validate.py adds engine_memory_zero_citations_after_search soft-warn (mirrors mempalace_ predecessor; both fire during cutover); engine/memory/verify_recall.py + engine/docs/audits/engine_memory_recall_S-0191.md — harness runs 25 historical zero-citation queries (from S-0184–S-0187 archive outcome_summary.boot_search_results) + 10 fresh queries against BOTH substrates; side-by-side comparison report. CUTOVER GATE at S-0191 close: if new substrate cite-worthy rate materially worse than MemPalace's, S-0192 HALTS and ADR 0091 reopens; otherwise comment verification_passed: true on Issue #138 and S-0192 proceeds. Closes T1-C of engine_memory_substrate_first_exercise.md. Also: closeout T1-B at S-0191 boot — the first Stop event post-S-0190 .claude/settings.json reload writes a room='work'/source_kind='hook_stop' drawer for the live session_id; verify via sqlite3 engine/.memory/engine_memory.sqlite3 query — ≥1 row of hook_stop closes T1-B; record evidence in readiness note's S-0190 empirical-record block. Carries S-0190 lesson (drawer_paideia_lessons_469873d7f0a87934c9aefcbc): pkill -f 'mempalace.*mcp' before any pytest engine/tools run + invoke .venv/bin/python directly to bypass the validate.py:ensure_venv_python() re-exec output-capture quirk.
